tool_input.content:
from core.plan import PlanManager
from core.memory_manager import MemoryManager
from core.engine import AgentEngine
from tools import get_default_tools
import time

pm = PlanManager()
mm = MemoryManager(plan_manager=pm)
tools = get_default_tools(plan_manager=pm, memory_manager=mm)
start = time.perf_counter()
e = AgentEngine(
    tools=tools,
    model='gpt-5.5',
    plan_manager=pm,
    session_id='default',
    base_url='http://example.invalid/v1',
    api_key='x',
    max_history=150,
    min_keep=8,
    memory_manager=mm,
)
print('elapsed_ms', round((time.perf_counter() - start) * 1000, 2))
print('counts', len(e.context.messages), len(e.context.working_memory), len(e.context.episodic_memory.get_all()), len(e.context.session_summaries), len(e.context.long_term_memory.item_index))
